channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: PACK. A. SANDWHICH. WITH. SOME. CHIPS. — 139 replies — 470.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
PACK. A. SANDWHICH. WITH. SOME. CHIPS.

Open thread • Replies: 139 • Updated: 2026-05-23 12:31 UTC

OP

PACK. A. SANDWHICH.

WITH. SOME. CHIPS.

Early replies (first 3)

62262487
>>62262449
maybe don't buy guac if you are poor and it costs $4.90

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62264124
>MAGA is telling you to eat like a slave so we can continue funding wars for Israel
>the same people that squealed like pigs a few years ago because eggs were pricey

62264174
>just eat poisonous fake food goyslop, goyim
>real food is reserved for us, not you

62264324
>>62263155
Yes its especially important while developing.

62264336
>>62264324
It's about humiliation. My expensive food isn't as good unless I make you eat garbage.

62264558
>>62262607
I agree with you anon. Boomers are boomers, don’t need to beat that dead horse. But routinely eating out is retarded on many levels.

62264577
>>62264124
this lol
fucking pathetic

62264580
>>62263206
Post body fatass

62264583
>>62262454
I love Dave Ramsey. Even more than loving him, I love when poor, stupid zoomers talk about how he's a retard and doesn't know anything. Then I ask them how a retard boomer like Dave becomes worth hundreds of millions of dollars while they can't afford a running car.

62264663
>>62262607
I think my dad was 19 years old when the gold standard was abandoned. Crazy what boomers got away with.

62264675
yes, you deserve to have fast food delivered to your door. yes, you deserve to have it chewed and dropped into your mouth.

62264691
>>62264583
I can afford a running car doe

62264733
>>62264583
>you being born into a dystopian hellscape economy is the same as being born a boomer with daddy's money backing him during the most prosperous time in human history

nice bait

62264944
>>62264089
> Unless you're on the road, there's no excuse for fast food anymore. It doesn't taste good, it's not healthy, and it's the same price as a normal takeout joint.
This. You can get to go meals from a real restaurant for like $2 more if you don’t feel like cooking or whatever. Fast food isn’t a value at all. It’s a necessity when you don’t have other options. Or if you’re retarded

62264946
>>62264122
Based

62264980
>>62262862
That's common here in New Zealand as well.
I've seen people turn up with;

A whole cooked chicken and nothing else.
A 12 pack of bread rolls and a tin of Tuna.
One large bag of carrots.
A tin of Baked Beans and no can opener.
A loaf of bread and a smoked chicken breast.
Half a dozen cooked snags.
Plain rice and a chicken drumstick.
Two Sea Urchins.
A cheesy loaf.
A banana bunch.

Last nights dinner is very common.

62265020
>>62262598
you can put a loaf of bread in the fridge to make it last longer, anon

62265030
>>62263602

62265033
>>62263530
they are too retarded to understand that the shiny rocks are what go into their computers to design and make their pokemon cards

62265037
>>62265020
depends on conditions, more important for bread is air tightness and moister.. putting it in some fridges can make it go faster depending.. you can freeze bread and defrost it as you need pretty fast though

62265043
>>62265037
For toast putting the bread in the freezer is just sensible.

62265138
>>62265020
Just stick it in a bread bin like a normal person

62265148
>>62262449
boomer here

I was 30 years old when I could afford to eat at a restaurant for anything other than a special occasion. I was 40 when I could afford to eat at a restaurant whenever I wanted.

younger generations don't get a lot of pity for demanding luxuries we worked our asses off for and they think are just rights every person deserves.

same with houses. And new cars. Earn it. It took us decades of work.

62265153
>>62265138
Look at this fancy fuck with his bread humidor.

62265271
I'm bringing bread and cheese and ham and some fucking canned soup with me to Stockholm next week to beat the Swedish jew and there's nothing you can do to stop me. And some booze in my checked bag. Buying alcohol in Sweden will bankrupt a millionaire.

62265280
>>62262630
To be honest you can make bread on the griddle, so the bread maker is just wasted money.

62265288
>>62265271
Buy Felix' Gulasch when you're there. It is a yummy soup.

62265303
>he doesn’t make his own bread

62265600
>>62265288
We have soup here where I live. I don't need to pay 10€ for a can or jar of Swedish goulash slop.

62265622
>check thread
>It's still an Indian psyop to get you to eat bread for every meal and live like a prisoner and be happy
I hate this board now

62265722
Isn't it obvious this entire thing is just the uber business model being deployed to food?

1. Establish yourself in an area
2. Undercut the competition
3. Make as many people as possible rely on your service
4. Establish a near monopoly
5. Raise prices
6. Profit

I mean people like to point out that the fast food prices went up during covid and blamed the money printing and rising wages. That neglects the people who were serious about the lockdown basically not leaving the house and just ordering delivery over and over until they got used to the idea. Then loan shark services like klarna drops by and offers people a way to extend the use even when you don't have money.

I mean one of the delivery companies literally is Uber.

item.title: /Biz revival — 44 replies — 176.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
/Biz revival

Open thread • Replies: 44 • Updated: 2026-05-23 12:41 UTC

OP

while this board is clearly dead and all we have left is 10 anons, one of which is a aid devastated bald whiny fag, i think this is the perfect time to try to revive this board.

"How"? i'm hearing you ask.
Well. Let's make this a general where we only share our best picks. NO pointless SHILLING, either stocks or the occasional good crypto you really believe in.


I'll start.

Litecoin is now around 50$. This is a generational bottom if you look on the multi year chart. A solid support. At this price, unless you're convinced altcoins and cryptos are over, it's a free lottery ticket. In the same spirit, LITS, a company which treasury is only composed of its litecoin holding is also a great way to get litecoin exposure.

Ton, the crypto of one if not the most used chatting app worldwide is going back to a historical bottom as we speak after doing a small pump following several changes and pavel durov's statement. (20% staking apy, many other changes planned i won't go into details but good narrative)

A risky stock play but with very good risk / reward ratio: UBISOFT, company went to shit, but they are restructuring and trying to turn things around. A potential 10 bagger over the next years if they can achieve that, and they definitively can if they stop their bullshit.

Early replies (first 3)

62265475
>>62265467
Just buy OpenAI at IPO.
All normalfags will do that and outperform your "smart" plays.
There's such a thing as being too smart.

62265476
>>62265474
yeah that's precisely what we're trying to avoid you fucking retard. Stay poor

62265480
but what if I am bald?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62265524
>>62265512
It hasn't even begun

62265525
>>62265467
The problem of your picks, at least for LTC and UBI (I don’t know anything about TON), is that they have no moat and their lunch is being eaten by newer and/or bigger rivals. They will probably bounce back at some point, but how high and after how many extra losses? And it’s not like these assets will be more resilient than others if a market downturn comes, they will probably sink even harder than the rest. Your capital could probably be allocated on better assets…

Cryptos with moat are BTC (the Coca-Cola of cryptos), the privacy-oriented ones (XMR and more dubiously ZEC) and the DeFi-oriented ones (which is promising for KAS whose upcoming Toccata hard fork will enable DeFi applications).

I wouldn’t touch any software company, including video games companies, because of the current AI frenzy and inflationary pressures on the consumer discretionary sector. That said, I’d rather hold any of the top 20 video games companies rather than UBI where you can’t say people wait for the next Ubisoft game like they wait for GTA VI or the next Mario. Overall I’d rather invest in RBLX or U.

62265535
>>62265486
>Just stop thinking and left curve it
Top signal. You’re going to learn the hard way that being thoughtful with your own money is important.

62265560
>>62265467
nice words didnt read them.

how profit?

62265569
>>62265524
IN case you didn't notice since AI is a thing nobody gives a fuck about electricity consumption anymore (major fudding point for btc before).

62265578
>>62265535
>being thoughtful with your own money
I am being thoughtful by deciding to leftcurve it.
Since I started leftcurving I made so much more money than when I though of myself as le smart investor doing contrarian plays that nobody else (except 1000 other plp in the world) understood.
Thinking too much is bad for investing.

62265579
>>62265560
>how profit?
Buy AI IPOs. AI = future. SIMPLE AS.

62265620
>>62265500

That's not the point. The point is to make money off it.

62265625
>>62265579
thanks bro

62265630
>>62265578
Being le perpetually contrarian reddit value investor is bad. But seeing macro patterns that currently point to uncanny similarities with the dotcom bubble, just more concentrated on a few debt-heavy and/or unprofitable trillion-dollar companies, leads the prudent investor to suspicion.

Now add the looming resource crisis due to the Iran war, plus the upcoming IPOs that will force passive index fund investors to gobble SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic shares at any overinflated price. That should make you think hard before "left curving" anything in these stocks.

62265634
>>62265467
/biz/ is dead and its never going to come back. You can thank the spambot deployers, so the mods

62265653
>>62265634
>posting on a forum (lol)
>on a website that looks and works like it’s 2008
>the year is 2026 though

Yeah, it’s not coming back.

62265657
OP is some indian faggot btw who is upset he can't scam here.
And he's bald.

62265658
>>62265467
Once the world realises it missed out on BTC it will flock to LTC with its cheaper price and limited cap. A 10k LTC by 2030 is entirely possible.

62265659
>baldie spammer is a LTC fag
How did I know lol.
LTC is a shit investment btw better off going with XMR but why invest when Trumps buttfucking our economy, watering down gas, drilling and logging the national forests.
Nothing is bullish
Is it however baldish.

62265663
>>62265658
It's 100% not possible maybe by 3030.
LTC is propped up because its very low transfer cost so it's used for cross platform transfers thus it's propped up.

62265665
>>62265658
Why LTC rather than any of the top 100 altcoins that do the exact same thing?

62265668
>>62265659
>Nothing is bullish
>Is it however baldish

Kek

62265670
>>62265665
Because they are married to their bags.
Number one mistake in crypto.
>HODL
was a psyop and most of the time results if not in losses a total wash.

62265685
>>62265663
Which Solana is roughly equivalent to at much higher throughput.

62265699
>>62265467
Good morning faggot, here's a theme for your thread.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QEsNDDwhSJ4

62265703
>>62265475
>just be a baggie instead

62265708
>>62265685
except solana is a centralized scam

litecoin is a light bitcoin. It is undervalued at its current price. And yes, it's used EVERYWHERE crypto can be used. This should tell you something. nobody is going to be bullish on an undervalued bottomed asset, which is why you should buy. I have never made money buying something shilled or already up multiple Xs

>>62265699
good morning, hopefully your liver is going to have some sort of final stroke today

62265715
Just generally go with the flow of the market, going against it always gave me negative returns.

Take my profits and move on.

There's no point fighting a strong current when you don't have a boat to fetch you.

62265719
>>62265475
Probably the best advice. I've learnt with years that you're almost never 'too late'. I fucked so many investments thinking I was too late for years, then finally FOMOing at the actual top. For example I was first buying BTC in 2013 but never in real volume. Then basically rekt myself getting into chainlink in 2019.

62265720
>>62265715
just martingale on the way down, it's not that hard

62265728
>>62265719
Sometimes you’re not too late, you’re actually too soon.

62265729
they'll repump crypto someday

62265735
>>62265670
Indeed. A useful mantra in this situation could be:

>my bags don’t know I love them

62265741
>>62265630
>That should make you think hard before "left curving" anything in these stocks.
I will not think hard. Thinking hard is the enemy of making money. Just vibe and shiet.

item.title: S&P 500 priced in gold — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
S&P 500 priced in gold

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-05-23 12:40 UTC

OP

everyone screeching about ATHs
S&P up 465% since 2001 in dollars
same index DOWN 64% in gold
one unit of S&P bought 143g gold in 2001
buys 50g today

Early replies (first 3)

62265597
thats some insane dollar depreciation familia

62265612
>>62265573
>cherry-picked entry point at the height of the dot-com bubble.

62265628
>>62265612
Good point. But that was the max historical data available on the platform where I saw this.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62265673
>>62265573
Yeah if you invest 100 bucks in sp500 for 50 years you won't even become a millionaire by the proper metrics

62265681
gold is overpriced

62265688
>>62265673
Exactly! Most people don't understand dollar debasement.

62265689
I was just thinking to myself I wanted to lose 10% of my money in conversion fees

62265694
>>62265681
Not really. Gold depreciated over 90% against many individual stocks. Just look at apple or any major stock.

62265736
>>62265573
source?

item.title: Would you jestermaxx for a HR roastie to get a job, /biz/? — 13 replies — 38.4/hr

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-05-23 12:28 UTC

Early replies (first 3)

62265537
>>62265528

There’s no point cause they won’t hire you anyway

62265541
>>62265528
i would; these stupid bitches don't have any real power over me. just smile and act like a prince and they'll usually open the door for you. feigning interest in a job is not hard. pro tip: no one is actually excited to work for a wage. they know it and they know you know it so just play their little game.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62265566
>>62265528
I answered that for my first ever job interview in a grocery store and got hired (pre modern roastie HR hellscape)

62265616
>>62265528

62265629
>>62265528
id cave her head in the spot. yes im a NEET

62265632
>>62265528
you're asking this like we have any other choice. We WILL jestermaxx, we WILL eat the bugs, we WILL marry the ready to settle down roastie

62265647
>>62265616
AI slop, but surprisingly good one. Almost got fooled. I wonder what was the prompt.

62265664
>>62265528
Needing a job for money gives women the ick.

62265674
>>62265528
>Would you jestermaxx for a HR roastie to get a job, /biz/?
I was unemployed 2 fucking years and I don't even know how I got a job in the end. Yea you gotta do what you gotta do. I had to get an FBI background check and I don't even live or work in the USA.

62265710
>>62265674
If the spooks ask me what kind of person you are I'll tell them you are usually high on your own meth.
Sorry not sorry

62265713
>>62265647
Retard

62265716
>>62265710
I had a TS/SCI for 12 years but I'm out of that game.
Private sector (real private sector) is hard mode for a white man - you have to be hyper competent to have a job at all.

item.title: This stock is literally rat poison quadrupled. — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
This stock is literally rat poison quadrupled.

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-05-23 12:38 UTC

OP

This stock is literally rat poison quadrupled.

No reality based in anything, just complete emotion.

-7% for a week while it smashed earnings, meanwhile everything else is shooting up like crazy 4-5% gains EVERY SINGLE DAY.

AMD 1M is up 54%
Nvidia 1M is up 7%. Literally poison.

Early replies (first 3)

62264735
>>62264699
What do you expect out of a stock that's up 1300% over 5 years and already holds the #1 spot by marketcap

62264762
>>62264699
I sold Nvidia when it hit $220 a few weeks ago. The past few quarters earnings report made me realize it's the most heavily manipulated stock right now. Only institutional investors decide when it dances

62265151
>>62264735
>holds the #1 spot by marketcap
this isn't a real reason tho
>"well, good work everyone, but we have #1 marketcap, time to stop growing!"
it's a spook, a fake constraint that sounds to people who don't understand the core ideas behind the economy (ie. the point of all of this)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62265162
>>62264735
The problem with being #1 is that there's only 1 direction left to go.

62265231
>>62264699
+64% 1Y is bad?

62265520
>>62264699
Your entitlement is absurd

62265568
>>62265231
not good enough and dont reflect their earning results.

62265613
>>62264699
Buy the rumours, sell the news, AI is a bubble and fuck the jews

62265732
>>62264699
>>62264735
Sigh I only made like 20% YTD I feel like a fool. Why was I holding oil and REI when I could have been all-in on tech.

Anyway, these chip companies are going to come up against harsh supply constraints. Energy is not getting cheaper, they need more of it, and helium is finite. Pretty sure production in the gulf took a hit, and of course there's little to no supply. I feel like it's going to get pretty ugly, then Trump will do something because he can't stand to see AI turn bearish on his watch.

item.title: What if wagies have it figured out? I used to think the NEET lifestyle was for losers, but now I'm wondering if my minds… — 5 replies — 20.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
What if wagies have it figured out? I used to think the NEET lifestyle was for losers, but now I'm wondering if my minds…

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-05-23 12:38 UTC

OP

What if wagies have it figured out? I used to think the NEET lifestyle was for losers, but now I'm wondering if my mindset is outdated. I know a few NEETs in their 20s and 30s and they all have so, so, so much more more time and energy than me. Most of them will inherit houses, and one of them has alluded to scamming the government for gibs and putting these in index funds. I suspect these people have more saved up than I do. All of them have learned random skills, some of which they can probably monetize if they need to get a job (I don't have time or energy to learn stuff, so ironically I might be less employable than these people if my current skillset becomes obselete). Also, these NEETs have consumed more leisure time than I will probably EVER consume in my entire life. I'm starting to get depressed and angry that I followed "the rules" when clearly they don't apply anymore. They're just boomer myths. Obviously there are NEETs in hellish lives and wagies in great lives, but as a general rule I think I've misjudged who has it better. Am I missing something here?

Early replies (first 3)

62265059
>>62265056
just chill. you don't need to consume so much you can work less and enjoy life more. see you can have all the money in the world but whats the point if you never get to enjoy it

62265245
let the wagies deal in the real world

62265323
>>62265056
>get capital and invest
>retire early with money
That's the best option for many people, rather than just being a neet or just being a wagie.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62265504
>>62265323
most fail at the get capital part and get stuck as slaves forgotten as soon as they stop being useful

62265733
>>62265504
>most fail at the get capital part and get stuck as slaves
majority of people are mentally weak, they can't stop consuming whenever they get paid, that's why they belong in wagie cagies and never get out

i dont think it will ever break 33 again...

if you are buying now, i recommend selling at 13

item.title: Anon, its my bday today Im in early 30s, close to no friends, no gf (ditched a bitch around 2 years ago), not much in th… — 59 replies — 137.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anon, its my bday today Im in early 30s, close to no friends, no gf (ditched a bitch around 2 years ago), not much in th…

Open thread • Replies: 59 • Updated: 2026-05-23 12:23 UTC

OP

Anon, its my bday today
Im in early 30s, close to no friends, no gf (ditched a bitch around 2 years ago), not much in the bank, had a successful career but then pivoted to make a startup and lost shit ton of money and time in the process. Not sure what to do anymore. Basically going through the dark night of the soul.

Now I'm here trying to find a tech job in a fucking US to not die on the street. You are, as usual, my only real friend.

Tell me something nice or not.

Early replies (first 3)

62261420
>>62261414
>Now I'm here trying to find a tech job in a fucking US
Are you a foreigner? Is this a LARP?

62261422
You did good

62261428
>>62261414
Your life can turn around in a week easy. New job, new girl, market pumps, whatever. Don't be so down anon you don't know what is around the corner. Also you're only early 30s, you're young as fuck, you have to live as long as you already have all over again before you hit mid 60s, just think how long that truly is. Stop worrying and enjoy your life you fag.

Happy Birthday, enjoy the magic trick.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62263942
>>62261512
Irish here. Because I went from making 52k€ to 200k USD by moving here.

62263944
>>62262866
Glad you liked it.
I was banging an 18 year old last year but got tired of it.
She had a kid already right after

62263952
>>62263942
but now you owe double taxes typically, or if you go back home, and cost of living in the US is more than likely higher than euros
I should have been a software fag, instead im a sickfag
this place is insanely expensive, how you enjoying the US?
Btw they just converted most gas to e-15 overnight watch it with your car, it can slag certain engines, this place is going to shit fast.

62263962
>>62263952
>Owe double taxes
No I don’t. Ireland and the USA have tax treaties. The cost of living where I live (east coast) is high but does not scale to eat up all of my income, otherwise I wouldn’t have moved here.
I am thoroughly enjoying the USA and wish I could stay but unfortunately my company are a bunch of cunts and don’t sponsor people. Been grand so far. Despite all of the stereotypes I work with geniuses in my field and there’s not that many turbo fatties.

62263984
what was the startup idea?

62264000
>>62263962
I figured you would like it, i have a friend Im trying to convince to move here, I'd sponsor him though I'm sure his work would.

If you get a chance to come back shoot for the midwest, Cerner has a lot of software jobs though might have changed names, cost of living is quite a bit less and still a chance to get a good home for decent pricing.

62264015
>>62264000
I’m not a software engineer, I’m a chemical engineer. Also, I’m supposed to move to the Midwest for the last year of my visa. Missouri.

62264068
>>62264015
There ya go I live in KC, there's a bayer plant I believe not too far off from me.

62264074
>>62264015
Also spray me with your poisons mister.

62264117
>>62261414
so you had one. stop whining you made your choices

62264167
>>62261501
worst cat picture

62264433
>>62263944
>banging an 18 year old last year
Schizo head canon until proven otherwise

62264610
>>62261414
You are a baby at 30

62264632
>>62261414
K-K-K-K-K-K-KWAB

62264651
>>62264074
>>62264068
No way. We should become bros when I move there.

62264653
Buy a pressure washer

62264665
>>62261414
You sound like a normal person.
The average person with a “wife” or “gf” are in a desperate position to keep their partner and has no leverage over the relationship anyways.
The average salary is $65k and is heavily pulled up by high earners.

62264676
>>62261414
even through the darkest nights, self improve. Focus on becoming better and growing more knowledge and experience. It will be the only thing you can take with you after death. Then you get to become a part of me. You all will as I will you

62264696
>>62264651
lol might be related I'm irish on both sides of my fathers side then again on my mothers, O'Noonans/Picts.
If you get your citizenship housing is still very cheap here and plenty of small cozy towns with 400-900 people only an hour or so from the big city.

62264705
>>62264433
lol she was a depressed black girl I met doordashing, was stressful due to one her being so young, and two her mom was my age lol.

62264708
>>62264433
I'd have to drop her off around the corner, wasn't illegal obviously but if her dad and mom had found out I was their age I'm fairly sure the dad might have shot me.
Luckily nobody ever caught wind of it, but she kept doing LSD with her friends and then call me asking to drive her away because shes having bad trips, I wasn't into it, I pushed her to date a guy she liked growing up with because it was the right thing to do, I didn't however expect her to get pregnant immediately, oh well she has some pretty bad beef curtains, but sadly think it was natural.

62264726
Sorry bros if I don't respond I got a terrible migraine today it happens a lot to me, but I got some dino nuggies and gonna sleep after.
It's interesting now when i get migrianes which might be stemming from the tumor in my fucking neck I feel this invisible crown on my head.
Almost like wearing a baseball cap except it's invisible the sensation of wearing a crown from my skull.
Then usually mind bending pain and nausea, once it happened to me in 2023 and I think my kidney was infected but I saw Ophainm and a green eye eminating from the middle of it looking at me.
Was the only hallucination I've ever experienced, and some out of body experiences during a bone marrow biopsy where I could see them drilling into my spine.
If I survive much longer I'm going to be shocked this surgery should have killed my ass.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3hnCT4yx0TM

62264747
And sorry for hijacking your thread if it is your birthday anon.
Have a pepe, your birthday is the same as my xister, who I can't really stand.

62264759
>>62261414
If it is your goal to improve, you will, even slowly. But it will not fall into your lap, at home especially. You will look back at these times and laugh.

62264763
>>62264696
What is Lenexa/ Shawnee/ Olathe like?

62264802
>>62264763
Rich and jewish, so downtown KC was all jews for a long time and grandview, after everything started getting older and more blacks and mexicans moved in they all uprooted and went to "leawood" but now leawoods getting old, expensive houses but now likely getting old, similar with Lenexa, Overland park is nice but again this is like a super rich migrated area so everythings much more expensive that being said there is a wonderful sushi restaurant in Lenexa named Sushi Uni, if you were to pick one I'd go Lenexa, it's less expensive than the leawood area.
Kansas taxes are shit, missouri has legal weed and lower gas prices and tobacco/housing.

The smarter people live in Lee's summit where I grew up but it's getting little crowded.
I'm actually thinking about leaving the city myself I had a farm as a kid in El dorado springs but my dad sold it to piss my mom off.

62264879
>>62261512
Deporting the illegals, lower taxes/higher pay, owning guns, etc…

62265650
>>62262803
>30y old.
>You are baby.
What's up with unc copes lately? 30 is when your life is basically over and your duty is to nourish the next generation.

62265678
>>62261414
>had a great career but thought I was smarter than I actually am so I tried to start my own business and failed
>could’ve had a cozy life but got greedy
>let me go to my favorite racist pedo chat board to complain

62265707
>>62261414
Man I wish I was 30 again, I could fix everything in my life. Happy Birthday

item.title: FIRE is mental illness — 219 replies — 135.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
FIRE is mental illness

Open thread • Replies: 219 • Updated: 2026-05-23 11:11 UTC

OP

No woman, no kids, $25k YEARLY spend.
You're not supposed to check out of society in your 30s and spend the rest of your life relaxing. What is wrong with modern men?

Early replies (first 3)

62259938
>>62259935
Keep slaving away goyman

62259945
>>62259935
Nice bait thread faggot

62259968
>>62259935
You can't really afford to marry on FIRE because one divorce ruins a decade+ of saving and then you have to work again. If a woman finds out you're FIRE she will absolutely divorce rape you too since the wealth disparity between you and her is so great she'll walk away with a ludicrous amount of money.

Huge downside of FIRE, you can never marry.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62263849
>>62263797
I’ll never understand the whole dink thing. just pointless to get married if you don’t plan on having kids.

62263988
>>62263605
>ask for specifics
>get vague references
>screenshot from fucking Australia
Kill yourself nigger
>Or any other million of scenarios where the pre-nup gets nullified in court.
Then show us two of them

62263992
>>62263988
you can't write a contract that violates the law.

so any time a prenup disagrees with divorce law, the prenup gets thrown out. It happens all the time.

62264003
>>62263428
>$10k or $100k
These are not the same.
But I agree with the sentiment. There's points in life where you gotta wake up and get your shit together.
>>62263605
Common Law Marriage was the most insane fucking thing when I first heard of it. In some states, if you've been dating a girl for 10 years, you legally end up considered married and have to pay shit like alimony if you break up.
It's the sort of thing that sounds like it was thought up in the 1800's, but nobody's repealed it.

62264007
>>62263653
The third person in the threesome is also another guy.

62264012
>>62263988
Not my fault you’re a retard. Why would I waste my time spoonfeeding a retard? You’re an incel anyways. Why do you care about prenups? You’ve never had sex.

62264027
>>62264003
>Common Law Marriage was the most insane fucking thing when I first heard of it. In some states, if you've been dating a girl for 10 years, you legally end up considered married and have to pay shit like alimony if you break up.
Yep, people don’t know how fucked up family law is until it starts dickslapping them in the face. What’s even funnier is when you find out that your 12 year old son actually isn’t biologically yours, but, for whatever myriad of reasons, the court doesn’t care and you gotta pay child support anyways. For a lot of states in a lot of circumstances, it actually doesn’t matter if “your” son came out of your balls or not. Your wife fucked the mailman and got caught? Sorry buddy, but that boy is still legally yours cuz reasons.

62264028
>>62259935
You're not supposed to check out of society in your 30s and spend the rest of your life relaxing.

Why not?
>

62264045
>>62263557
Why would he be a deadbeat? If he leaves, he can send them like 300 dollars a month and they will be okay. Also pay for their college, etc

62264297
>>62263178
why do people just larp and completely invent stories on this site? is it some kind of attention seeking thing from an unresolved toddler need?

truly disgusting lot on this board. i think i won't be coming back.

62264345
>>62259935
sorry, your thread has been noticed

62264378
>>62259935
This is not the person I would mock, he actually did fucking make it. I have no idea how you get 12 years in work make near 2 million and also a fully paid house jesus christ wow.

You should mock me, I was 39, decided I wasn't wasting my 40s in a deadend job but I had 400K saved up and just said fuck it tried to invest in dividend stocks and live in my parents house they kicked me out so I tried to day trade with 200K and seven years later I am finally broke and need a job but I got a super shitty resume and no recent job history or references who remember who I am.

I am near 50 and am pretty fucked. Trying to not kill myself. Might do a bootcamp for tech with last 10K or go try a masters or do the grind Walmart -- Office -- go back to banking.

62264379
>>62264045
the most important thing about a dad is spending time with the kids, not sending 300 a month. The girl will be a whore and son turn trans without that presence. Look at Elon's kid.

62264434
>>62264379
> the most important thing about a dad is spending time with the kids
Not true. Grew up with really rich kids. Money is more important. Only brokie fathers think time with kids is more important.

62264547
>>62263992
Yeah. But you absolutely CAN structure a legal one that lets you split premarital assets. That’s been my whole point. You’re comparing apples and railroad ties.

62264551
>>62264012
>still no proof
Keep going. This is fun.
>never had sex
Woman argument. You’ve lost and it’s clear.

62264565
>>62264379
The kid will have their mom's parents, grandparents, aunt and uncles, etc. That stuff can happen regardless, even in the West with two loving parents. And he can stay in the country and visit them from time to time if he really wants.

62264595
>>62259935
>You're not supposed to check out of society in your 30s and spend the rest of your life relaxing.
Kek, why not? I'm on the same exact path. Life is extremely cozy. Fuck this faggot society

62264600
>>62259968
>Huge downside of FIRE, you can never marry.
what kind of faggot do you have to be to unironically write this shit? If you even consider getting married in le current year, you are a wheelchair bound, drool tier fucking retard.

62264605
>>62260997
based

62264672
>>62264595
You’re supposed to slave away like everyone else.
lol.
“Society” is like 95% worker bees with no choice but to toll.

62264833
>>62259935
I dislike people cooking for me. I don't know how I will be able to voice this to my future wife

62264838
>Aw geez guys I have 76 years of spending saved up at 35 years old do I have enough to retire?
Uhh, yes. Congrats. Although he'd be better off putting most of it in a trust with a reasonable $40k/yr drawdown and pursue marriage as a trustfund kid, and not have to worry about divorce after that.

62264839
>>62260039
>>62262037
These comics were highly respected in the olden days. Remember this one?

62264927
>>62259968
Marry a rich bride, retard. Fucking low class roastoid marrying nigger, just kill yourself loser.

62264930
>>62259980
Where do all you currycels come from? Unbelievable.

62265011
>>62260025
Surrogacy. Be a single dad.

62265250
>>62259935
>You're not supposed to check out of society in your 30s

62265283
>>62259968
>marry
>because one divorce
Then don't marry?
>muh keedz
You can have them without marrying
>muh common law
Move somewhere where that's not a thing, or recycle through women.
>>62259993
>monk
You can enjoy life without living paycheck to paycheck. Sex is basically free if you find the right girl. Packing homemade food and eating somewhere new every weekend costs less than fast food.

62265591
>>62260376
>who's going to pay for my kids now
He will through taxes

item.content:encoded:

OP

If you still don’t own any Bitcoin yet, anon what the hell are you waiting for?

>Banks give you tiny interest while inflation slowly destroys your purchasing power anyway. I’d rather have BTC long term than let my money rot in a savings account.

Early replies (first 3)

62245757
i get 5btc later for cheaper but thanks for the advice!

62245760
>>62245741
Too eqrly but yeah and avoid cex or at least take it out as fast as u can!

62246438
>>62245757

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62258577
>>62257680
you have zero bitcoin

62258754
>>62257223

62258775
>>62257679
nonsense. It's all in your head

62258793
>>62258754

62259397
>>62245757
lets hold hands and buy in Oct

62259745
>>62259397

62260090
>>62259745
He’s buying

62261050
>>62257679

62261057
>>62252472
Buy btc for many reasons anon.

62261131
>>62257675

62261260

>>62261131

62261264

62261340
>>62257392

62261342
>>62252488

62261452
>>62260090

62261462
>>62261452
no chance
this will count as the summer of the big dump

62261476
>>62261462

62261608
>>62261340

62261618
>>62261462

62261632
>>62252488

62261641

62262278
>>62259397

62262820
>>62261608

62262829
>>62261131

62262834
>>62256924

62262852

62262893

62264806

62265221

62265362

item.title: why does this keep happening — 36 replies — 21.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
why does this keep happening

Open thread • Replies: 36 • Updated: 2026-05-23 11:06 UTC

OP

>Link pumps to $10
>BTC instantly takes a nosedive

Why is Link not allowed to go above $10?

Early replies (first 3)

62263473
because fuck you, stinkie
it really all boils down to that
the entire crypto market exists JUST TO FUCK YOU STINKIES OVER
how does that make you feel
it makes me feel pic related

62263519
>>62263473
hey it's the dick guy

62263588
But Sirgay said they've decoupled from crypto prices

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62263870
>>62263230
Take your meds, its literally just following the btc chart. All the alt charts are the same.
Btc pumps = alts pump
Btc dumps = alts dump

Idk why you retards think link is the one causing btc to pump and dump when its the other way around

62264096
>>62263870
Sure thing rabbi

62264135
Coinbase constantly has positive notifications sent out for link, but the price is always shidding and farding.
For example: pic related

62264172
>>62263870
>ts literally just following the btc chart.
Bitcoin was crabbing, and the second Link pumped and hit $10, Bitcoin dumped.

Are you blind.

62264180
>>62264172
sweetie you forgot your medicine :}

62264354
>>62263230
because you're retarded enough to think that BTC is dumping because of LINK's movement rather than LINK is dumping because of BTC's movement.

62264389
>>62263473
why does this bitch have such a pointy schnoz, is she a kike?
t. link investoor (newfag)

62264394
>>62263870
>Btc pumps = alts pump
>Btc dumps = alts dump
More like
Btc pumps = alts dump
Btc dumps = alts dump
simple as

62264410
>>62264354
No he understands that BTC dumps, to drag link down, before it pumps too high

Just DCA anons, they'll unleash it when they're ready

62264427
>>62264410
Wrong you dumb link nigger. EVERYTHING dumps when BTC dumps. Every single coin has TA levels called resistances and supports. Shitcoins like LINK won't break its resistance without permission from BTC (permission being BTC breaking through its own resistance level) so LINK will just sit at resistance waiting on BTC's permission to go higher. If BTC dumps then LINK will dump without ever breaking the current resistance because it is a shitcoin and BTC controls movement.

Your inability to understand this is why you're poor and still bagholding absolute garbage after all these years. Hope this helps.

62264474
>>62264427
retard

62264483
>>62264474
stay poor bagholder

62264512
>>62264474
we'll never let u live it down stinker
you lost

62264795
>>62264172
Btc spiking is exactly what caused link to go to $10 dumbfuck

62264817
We will dump BTC
We will turn hanta into covid 2.0
We will pop the AI bubble
We will start WW3
We will do whatever it takes, and there's nothing you can do about it linkie

62264876
>>62263230
>Link pumps to $10
>pumps
Does anyone else remember when linkies could've exited for $30+?

62264877
>>62264427
>EVERYTHING dumps when BTC dumps.
That's not responding the argument being made m8. The claim is that link pump > BTC dump - not BTC dump > link dump. If you were contending with the thread seriously, the counterpoint should be that bitcoin dumps when ANYTHING pumps. But that wasn't your counterpoint. Because it doesn't happen. And you know you're being disingenuous.

62264884
>>62264877
you're a poor bagholding loser who has held for 8 years and missed countless opportunities.

62264934
>>62264877
you're a poor bagholding loser who has held for 8 years and missed countless opportunities.

62265147
>>62263870
Sure that's why shit like tron and hype pumped while BTC crashed..kys

62265193
>>62264795
>Btc spiking
what the fuck are you smoking

62265210
>>62265193
link is never gonna go to a 1000 buckerinos

62265234
>>62263230

im posting a screenshot of what i wrote because tranny jannies want to censor trvth nuke as fuck.

Fuck you jannies.

62265249
>>62265234
I knew screenshot anon was fucking retarded

62265256
>>62263230
Sergey gotta eat

62265265
>>62265256
by dumping BTC?

62265301
>>62264934

Cuckolds can’t accept that their poverty was caused by poor investment decisions rather than a nefarious cabal suppressing their shitcoin kek

62265313
>>62265301

It crashed below 100k the day smartcon began too

62265377
>>62265313
you're a cuckold

62265581

62261183

62261263

62261274
>>62261263

62261517

62261678

62261685
>>62261166

62261687
>>62261517

62262003

62262910
>>62261274

62263805
>>62261166

"be a good little moon boy, don't do anything useful or productive, dont figure shit out. buy moon coin and watch the line go up and down like a good little boy. don't forget to wonder who Satoshi Nakamoto is every once an awhile to switch things up." literally go die

62255610
>>62254676
